overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The player moves along neon-lit streets beneath massive overpasses, crosses intersections with futuristic vehicles, and approaches a dark alleyway. The scene features high-end game engine graphics with prominent green neon lighting and large digital billboards characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: Walking under a covered transit overpass with green neon lighting, approaching a yellow-striped crosswalk. A large Kiroshi advertisement dominates the right side as futuristic vehicles pass by on the multi-lane street below.

segments.scene_description: Crossing the street and continuing along the sidewalk beneath the overpass, passing a stationary pedestrian in a white jacket. The environment darkens as the camera moves deeper under the concrete structure, passing a parked green muscle car and industrial trash bins.

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered underpass into an open downtown street illuminated by modern street lights. Large digital billboards including one advertising 'Body Without Limits' line the street as traffic continues to flow past.

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering a narrow dark alleyway between concrete buildings

narrow passage between concrete buildings leading into darkness

segments.scene_description: Approaching a narrow alleyway entrance marked by bright green neon trim. The surroundings become significantly darker as the camera enters the enclosed passage between concrete buildings, leaving the main street behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a neon-lit transit hub through a bustling downtown street and into a secluded urban alley. It begins beneath a covered overpass bathed in green neon light, moving past a large Kiroshi advertisement and across a yellow-striped crosswalk as futuristic vehicles stream by. As the camera continues along the sidewalk, the environment darkens under the concrete structure, passing a pedestrian in a white jacket and a parked green muscle car. The scene then opens into a bright downtown thoroughfare illuminated by modern street lights and massive digital billboards, including one for Body Without Limits, before turning toward a narrow passage. Finally, the camera enters a dark alleyway marked by bright green neon trim, leaving the open city street behind for the enclosed space between concrete buildings.
